## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production facing challenges with technical review process; team exploring ways to streamline](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [3 new articles ready for review; aiming to publish at least 1-2 this week](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Early performance metrics for published articles showing positive engagement (42-47%)](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Team to get access to Qualified for deeper audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Challenges

  - [Technical review process causing delays, especially for data engineering topics](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Team discussing balance between accuracy and speed to maintain publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Exploring options to simplify authorship attribution (e.g., "Prophecy Team")](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Considering strategy to publish content and enrich later to maintain momentum](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Content Pipeline and Review

  - [3 new articles ready for review: "Mastering ETL", "How to Choose a Best CL Tool", and "Real Challenges"](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Aiming to move these to "Stage 6: Queued to be Published" for next week](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Team working to get at least 1-2 articles published this week](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Discussing approach for Anya's article (SQL vs. Spark examples)](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [New report format introduced, showing data for entire website and by category](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Two published articles showing positive engagement rates (42-47%)](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Traffic sources include Google, Bing, Yahoo, and interestingly, Perplexity AI](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Team sees potential in tracking qualified leads through Qualified platform](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

### Team Communication and Tools

  - [Discussing access to Qualified for deeper audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Planning to incorporate Qualified data into weekly reporting](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Matt to touch base before his absence next week to align on priorities](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish Anya's article with SQL examples, consider future update](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Review and aim to publish 1-2 of the 3 new articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Set up Vivek with access to Qualified for audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Schedule rewrite of Anya's article for 4 weeks out](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Continue working on 3 more articles for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Matt to align on priorities before his absence next week](https://fathom.video/share/L_jGN8Fp9XQzVcrVGLSkWy_Y6EKSQQKp?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
